message:
test(core,db): add 16 unit tests for disk, tracking, and pool

disk.rs (+7): DiskPressure as_u64/from_u64 roundtrip, unknown-to-Ok
mapping, label coverage, disk_free_bytes success/failure, classify
edge cases (all-zero thresholds, saturating mul).

tracking.rs (+5): query_timer/elapsed_us monotonicity, global_tracker
identity, record_query routing to global vs active tracker.

pool.rs (+4): from_env defaults use auto_pool_size, sqlite_path for
memory/file/invalid URLs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
